request.request_text: Provide user access listings and reviews, change logs and approved changes, IT operations reports (jobs, incidents, backups), password policy and configurations, organization chart and roles matrix, and audit logs with review evidence. Ensure all files include dates, approvals, labels, and brief descriptions.

interpretation.original_request: Provide user access listings and reviews, change logs and approved changes, IT operations reports (jobs, incidents, backups), password policy and configurations, organization chart and roles matrix, and audit logs with review evidence. Ensure all files include dates, approvals, labels, and brief descriptions.

interpreted_tasks.task_description: Provide user access listings and reviews to verify that user accounts are authorized and reviewed periodically, ensuring proper segregation of duties and access controls are maintained.
Provide change logs and approved changes to confirm that all system or configuration changes are recorded, approved, and implemented under proper authorization.
Provide IT operations reports (jobs, incidents, backups) to assess the reliability and integrity of operations, including job performance, incident response, and backup success rates.
Provide password policy and configurations to ensure passwords are managed according to defined security policies, including complexity, expiration, and enforcement.
Provide organization chart and roles matrix to evaluate role-based access and ensure that system permissions align with business responsibilities and governance policies.
Provide audit logs with review evidence to assess the completeness and accuracy of system activity tracking, including the identification of potential unauthorized access or changes.

interpretation.interpretation_notes: The audit objective is to ensure that access controls, authorization processes, and system monitoring are properly maintained and reviewed in alignment with established policies and procedures.
